mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application_case_extraction (application_case_id, job_posting_id, user_id, source_type, status, error_message, started_at, finished_at) VALUES (#{applicationCaseId}, #{jobPostingId}, #{userId}, #{sourceType}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM application_case_extraction WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING') ORDER BY FIELD(status, 'RUNNING', 'QUEUED'), created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT * FROM application_case_extraction WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM application_case_extraction WHERE status = 'RUNNING' AND started_at IS NOT NULL AND started_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeoutMinutes} MINUTE) ORDER BY started_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM application_case_extraction WHERE status = 'QUEUED' ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM application_case_extraction WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'RUNNING' FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE application_case_extraction SET status = 'RUNNING', error_message = NULL, extraction_strategy = NULL, quality_score = NULL, quality_status = NULL, quality_report_json = NULL, model_versions_json = NULL, fallback_eligible = 0, fallback_reason = NULL, reviewed_at = NULL, started_at = NOW(), finished_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'QUEUED'

UPDATE application_case_extraction SET status = 'SUCCEEDED', job_posting_id = #{jobPostingId}, error_message = NULL, extraction_strategy = #{extractionStrategy}, quality_score = #{qualityScore}, quality_status = #{qualityStatus}, quality_report_json = #{qualityReportJson}, model_versions_json = #{modelVersionsJson}, fallback_eligible = #{fallbackEligible}, fallback_reason = #{fallbackReason}, finished_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE application_case_extraction SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, extraction_strategy = #{extractionStrategy}, quality_score = #{qualityScore}, quality_status = #{qualityStatus}, quality_report_json = #{qualityReportJson}, model_versions_json = #{modelVersionsJson}, fallback_eligible = #{fallbackEligible}, fallback_reason = #{fallbackReason}, finished_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'RUNNING'

UPDATE application_case_extraction SET job_posting_id = #{jobPostingId}, quality_status = 'PASS', quality_score = #{qualityScore}, quality_report_json = #{qualityReportJson}, model_versions_json = #{modelVersionsJson}, fallback_eligible = 0, fallback_reason = NULL, reviewed_at = NOW(), error_message = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SUCCEEDED' AND quality_status IN ('PASS', 'REVIEW_REQUIRED')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM application_case_extraction WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING')
